rules.title: PII Data Encryption in Transit
rules.description: All PII data must be encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+
required_actions: Enable TLS 1.2+ for all API endpoints

rules.title: PII Data Encryption at Rest
rules.description: All PII data must be encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent
required_actions: Implement application-level encryption for sensitive fields

rules.title: Data Residency Requirements
rules.description: Customer PII must be stored in approved geographic regions
required_actions: Obtain legal approval for cross-border transfers

rules.title: Third-Party SaaS Assessment
rules.description: External SaaS handling OFFICIAL or PII data requires security assessment

rules.title: Vendor Lock-in Assessment
rules.description: Evaluate migration path and exit strategy for third-party dependencies

rules.title: Authentication Standard
rules.description: All services must implement OAuth 2.0 or SAML 2.0 for authentication

rules.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
rules.description: Services handling PII or RESTRICTED data must support MFA

rules.title: Audit Logging Requirements
rules.description: All access to PII and RESTRICTED data must be logged
required_actions: Log all read/write operations with user identity

rules.title: Security Event Logging
rules.description: Security events must be logged to centralized SIEM

rules.title: Network Segmentation
rules.description: Services must be deployed in appropriate network zones based on data classification
required_actions: Deploy in DMZ or private subnet

rules.title: Backup and Recovery
rules.description: Critical data must be backed up with tested recovery procedures

rules.title: Vulnerability Management
rules.description: All services must undergo regular vulnerability scanning
